column1: # Ignore false-positive alerts common in Next.js/Node.js stacks
# Content-Security-Policy — handled by NGINX upstream, ZAP scans pre-NGINX
# Storable and Cacheable Content — static assets are intentionally cacheable
# Timestamp Disclosure — not sensitive in this context
# Server leaks version — mitigated in nginx (server_tokens off)
# Application Error Disclosure — handled by error middleware
# User-controllable HTML element (not XSS risk in API-first app)

column5: API-first app, not rendering user HTML directly
